trigger: Before starting a software project task that changes workflow assets
When planning, reviewing, or validating project-governance work from a Chrys session

native_entry.note: Chrys auto-loads AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md as native context files and has native load_skill/read_skill_resource/run_skill_script tools

ask_user_question.evidence: Chrys has a native ask_user tool for user interaction boundaries. This is the first adapter with native AskUserQuestion-equivalent capability.

sub_agent.evidence: Chrys has native explore_agent, plan_agent, and general_agent sub-agent tools that support the workflow's Agent Team routing pattern.

tool_calling.evidence: Chrys has a rich native tool set: read_file, write_file, edit_file, grep, glob, pwsh, git_bash, convert_document, sleep.

browser.evidence: Chrys does not have a native browser automation tool.
browser.degraded_mode: Mark browser validation blocked or use an external browser tool when available.

mcp.evidence: MCP availability depends on host configuration.
mcp.degraded_mode: Use local scripts and record MCP unavailable when no MCP server is configured.

git_hooks.evidence: Workflow installs and validates pre-commit, commit-msg, and post-commit hooks.

workflow_closure.evidence: Chrys has the strongest closure of any adapter: native ask_user_question, sub_agent, tool_calling, and git_hooks. Only browser and MCP remain host-dependent.

runtime_e2e.version_command: chrys is the agent running this verification session
runtime_e2e.evidence: This adapter-manifest.json was designed and validated from within a live Chrys session at D:\AI\agent\claude\coding\project_management_workflow. Chrys read AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md as auto-loaded context, executed governance bootstrap, and demonstrated native load_skill, sub-agent spawning (plan_agent), ask_user interaction, and full tool calling.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project cwd and returned governance status.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: Chrys session reading .governance/plan-tracker.md from project cwd
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: Chrys is the active runtime in this session. It read AGENTS.md bootstrap, loaded .governance/plan-tracker.md, and assembled a complete integration plan via plan_agent sub-agent. E2E_PLATFORM=chrys; E2E_AGENT=Coordinator.
